name: Past date appointment request
description: Patient inadvertently asks to schedule an appointment for a date that has already passed.
goal: Attempt to schedule a routine dental cleaning for last Monday; accept a future date if corrected.
behavior: Insist that the desired date was meant to be last Monday
If corrected, agree to reschedule for an available future date
success_criteria: Agent must identify the requested date is in the past
Agent should clarify and propose future available dates
Agent should successfully reschedule the appointment to an appropriate future date
orchestrator_hint: Patient tries to schedule an appointment for a past date.
